JURY TRIAL CONTINUED TO MAY-13-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 606

DEPT 606, JDG RYAN, G.ESPINOCILLA,CLERK, D.COSTELLO,CSR. AFTER LENGTHY DISCUSSIONS, A JUDGMENT PURS TO STIP SIGNED BY PLTF AND DEFT SUBMITTED TO COURT. THE DEFT UNDERSTANDS AND AGREES TO ALL TERMS. JDG RYAN SIGNS JUDGMENT. JT VACATED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS, THOMAS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 350 TURK STREET, #T1601, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $1,500.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00, STAYED UNTIL JUN-15-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT WAIVES RIGHT TO ANY STAY OF EVICTION, TO MOVE FOR A NEW TRIAL, & TO APPEAL ON ANY GROUND; ANY PERS PROP LEFT AFTER 6/15/98 SHALL BECOME PERS PROP OF PLTF; SEC DEP SHALL BE RETAINED BY PLTF; IF DEFT VACATES BY 5/31/98 & FULFILLS ALL TERMS, PLTF SHALL FILE A DISM W/ PREJUDICE; MUTUAL RELEASE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, THOMAS DOES 1 TO 4 SUMMONS ISSUED
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, THOMAS DOES 1 TO 4
